metadata.comments: Solution template for BlueVoyant Anthropic ClaudeCompliance

metadata.description: Not used, but needed to pass arm-ttk test `Location-Should-Not-Be-Hardcoded`.  We instead use the `workspace-location` which is derived from the LA workspace
[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
resource group name where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
subscription id where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

connectorUiConfig.title: BV-ClaudeCompliance (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
## BV-ClaudeCompliance (via Codeless Connector Framework)

This connector ingests **ClaudeCompliance** API data into Microsoft Sentinel using RestApiPoller.

### Data Collection
- Base API URL: `https://api.anthropic.com/`
- Authentication: `APIKey`
- Endpoint count: `1`

### Tables
- `ComplianceActivities` -> `BV_ClaudeCompliance_ComplianceActivities_CL`

### Sample Query
```kusto
BV_ClaudeCompliance_ComplianceActivities_CL
| take 10
```

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

instructionSteps.title: Connect BV-ClaudeCompliance (via Codeless Connector Framework) to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description:
To obtain a Claude Compliance API key, follow the instructions found here: [Access the Compliance API](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/13015708-access-the-compliance-api).

The API key created must include the **`read:compliance_activities`** scope for proper data ingestion.

Paste the key below and select **Connect**.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Time the record was ingested into the workspace (use TimeGenerated for time-range filters in detections; created_at is the true event time).

columns.name: id_CF
columns.description: Unique identifier for the activity, e.g. 'activity_abcd1234'. Stored as id_CF ('id' is a reserved Log Analytics name). Common to ALL activity types - use to deduplicate or correlate a single event.

columns.name: type_CF
columns.description: The compliance activity type, e.g. 'abuse_decision_received'. Stored as type_CF ('type' is reserved). Common to ALL activity types - this is the PRIMARY field to filter on when writing a detection or hunting query for a specific activity. Stored as type_CF because 'type' is a reserved Log Analytics column name.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: When the activity actually occurred (event time). Common to ALL activity types.

columns.name: organization_id
columns.description: Organization ID this activity is associated with. Common to ALL activity types - use to scope detections to a tenant/org.

columns.name: organization_uuid
columns.description: Organization UUID where the activity occurred. Null when the activity is not tied to an organization (e.g. login/logout events or Compliance API calls). Common to ALL activity types.

columns.name: actor
columns.description: Who performed the activity (polymorphic object). Common to ALL activity types. Key sub-fields for SIEM: actor.type, actor.ip_address, actor.user_agent, actor.user_id, actor.email_address, actor.api_key_id, actor.service_account_id - primary fields for attributing who did what and from where.

columns.name: claude_artifact_id
columns.description: The artifact the file was accessed through, if any, e.g. "claude_artifact_01HX...". Activity types: claude_artifact_access_failed, claude_artifact_created, claude_artifact_sharing_updated, claude_artifact_viewed, claude_file_access_failed, claude_file_viewed.

columns.name: claude_chat_id

Activity types: claude_chat_access_failed, claude_chat_created, claude_chat_deleted, claude_chat_deletion_failed, claude_chat_settings_updated, claude_chat_snapshot_created, claude_chat_snapshot_deleted, claude_chat_snapshot_viewed, claude_chat_updated, claude_chat_viewed, claude_file_uploaded.

columns.name: claude_file_id
columns.description: The file the user was denied access to, e.g. "claude_file_01HX...". Activity types: claude_file_access_failed, claude_file_deleted, claude_file_uploaded, claude_file_viewed, claude_project_file_access_failed, claude_project_file_deleted, claude_project_file_deletion_failed, claude_project_file_uploaded.

columns.name: claude_project_id
columns.description: The project the file was accessed through, if any, e.g. "claude_proj_01HX...". Activity types: claude_chat_created, claude_chat_deleted, claude_chat_settings_updated, claude_chat_updated, claude_chat_viewed, claude_file_access_failed, claude_file_uploaded, claude_file_viewed, claude_project_archived, claude_project_created, claude_project_deleted, claude_project_document_access_failed, claude_project_document_deleted, claude_project_document_deletion_failed, claude_project_document_updated, claude_project_document_uploaded, claude_project_document_viewed, claude_project_file_access_failed, claude_project_file_deleted, claude_project_file_deletion_failed, claude_project_file_uploaded, claude_project_reported, claude_project_sharing_updated, claude_project_sync_source_created, claude_project_sync_source_deleted, claude_project_sync_source_updated, claude_project_viewed.

columns.name: filename
columns.description: Deprecated — DO NOT USE. Always empty; the file's display name is intentionally omitted. Activity types: claude_file_access_failed, claude_file_deleted, claude_file_uploaded, claude_file_viewed, claude_project_document_access_failed, claude_project_document_deleted, claude_project_document_deletion_failed, claude_project_document_updated, claude_project_document_uploaded, claude_project_document_viewed, claude_project_file_uploaded.

columns.name: auth_method
columns.description: The method the user used to authenticate. May be absent on activities recorded before this field was introduced. Activity types: magic_link_login_succeeded, social_login_succeeded, sso_login_succeeded.

columns.name: mfa_method
columns.description: The second authentication factor performed during this login, if any. null when the second-factor status is not recorded on this event — for example, when authentication was delegated to an external identity provider and any second factor is not visible to Anthropic, or when this event is one step of a multi-step login whose MFA is reported on another activity. May be absent on activities recorded before this field was introduced. Activity types: magic_link_login_succeeded, social_login_succeeded, sso_login_succeeded.

columns.name: provider
columns.description: The external provider backing the sync source, e.g. github , google_drive , outline , slack , salesforce , google_calendar , gmail , asana , or mcp_resources . Activity types: claude_project_sync_source_created, claude_project_sync_source_deleted, claude_project_sync_source_updated, social_login_succeeded.

columns.name: spend_limit_id
columns.description: Tagged ID of the spend limit. Activity types: extra_usage_spend_limit_created, extra_usage_spend_limit_deleted, extra_usage_spend_limit_increase_request_approved, extra_usage_spend_limit_updated, platform_spend_limit_deleted, platform_spend_limit_updated, workspace_member_spend_limit_deleted, workspace_member_spend_limit_updated, workspace_spend_limit_deleted.

Activity types: admin_api_key_updated, claude_organization_settings_updated, claude_user_settings_updated, org_data_residency_updated, platform_api_key_updated, platform_federation_issuer_updated, platform_federation_rule_updated, platform_service_account_updated, platform_service_account_workspace_member_updated, platform_workspace_member_updated, platform_workspace_updated, scoped_api_key_updated.

columns.name: updated_fields
columns.description: Names of the fields changed by this update, e.g. "name", "description", "project_type", "design_systems". Activity types: design_project_updated.

columns.description: Which data set was exported. Absent on records written before this field was introduced. Activity types: org_data_export_accessed, org_data_export_completed, org_data_export_started.

columns.description: Top-level 'consent_type' property from the Claude compliance activity feed. Activity types: user_consent_recorded, user_consent_revoked.

columns.name: limit_action
columns.description: The action taken when the limit is reached (notify_only or notify_and_pause). Activity types: platform_spend_limit_created, workspace_member_spend_limit_created, workspace_spend_limit_created.

columns.name: limit_usd
columns.description: The spend limit threshold in USD cents. Activity types: platform_spend_limit_created, workspace_member_spend_limit_created, workspace_spend_limit_created.

columns.name: new_limit_usd
columns.description: The new spend limit threshold in USD cents. Activity types: workspace_member_spend_limit_updated.

columns.name: artifact_type
columns.description: Artifact type (code, html, react, etc.). Activity types: claude_artifact_published.

columns.name: audience
columns.description: Sharing audience for the project. If empty, it's only visible to the creating user. Activity types: claude_artifact_sharing_updated, claude_project_sharing_updated.

columns.name: claude_artifact_version_id
columns.description: The version identifier recorded as live by this publish. Activity types: claude_artifact_access_failed, claude_artifact_published, claude_artifact_sharing_updated.

columns.name: claude_chat_snapshot_id
columns.description: Top-level 'claude_chat_snapshot_id' property from the Claude compliance activity feed. Activity types: claude_chat_snapshot_created, claude_chat_snapshot_deleted, claude_chat_snapshot_viewed.

columns.name: claude_project_document_id
columns.description: Top-level 'claude_project_document_id' property from the Claude compliance activity feed. Activity types: claude_project_document_access_failed, claude_project_document_deleted, claude_project_document_deletion_failed, claude_project_document_updated, claude_project_document_uploaded, claude_project_document_viewed.

columns.name: claude_project_sync_source_id
columns.description: Tagged ID of the per-project sync source that was created. Activity types: claude_project_sync_source_created, claude_project_sync_source_deleted, claude_project_sync_source_updated.

columns.name: current_value
columns.description: Setting value immediately after this change. Activity types: org_analytics_api_capability_updated, org_claude_code_data_sharing_disabled, org_claude_code_data_sharing_enabled, org_claude_code_desktop_disabled, org_claude_code_desktop_enabled.

columns.name: design_project_id
columns.description: The Design project that was created, e.g. "design_proj_01HX...". Activity types: design_project_created, design_project_deleted, design_project_updated.

columns.name: file_id
columns.description: The tagged ID of the downloaded file. Activity types: platform_file_content_downloaded, platform_file_deleted, platform_file_uploaded.

columns.name: from_date
columns.description: Start date of the export range. Activity types: audit_log_export_started.

columns.name: previous_value
columns.description: Setting value immediately before this change. Activity types: org_analytics_api_capability_updated, org_claude_code_data_sharing_disabled, org_claude_code_data_sharing_enabled, org_claude_code_desktop_disabled, org_claude_code_desktop_enabled.

columns.name: title_CF
columns.description: Title of the published artifact. Stored as title_CF because 'title' is a reserved Log Analytics column name. Activity types: claude_artifact_published.

columns.name: to_date
columns.description: End date of the export range. Activity types: audit_log_export_started.

columns.name: cli_name
columns.description: CLI name as declared by the plugin manifest. Activity types: cli_plugin_exec_policy_updated.

columns.name: folder_id
columns.description: Top-level 'folder_id' property from the Claude compliance activity feed. Activity types: claude_gdrive_integration_created, claude_gdrive_integration_deleted, claude_gdrive_integration_updated.

columns.name: github_webhook_id
columns.description: GitHub-assigned webhook ID returned by the hooks API. Activity types: marketplace_webhook_provisioned.

columns.name: installation_preference
columns.description: New installation preference value (set only when action is an update; null for delete actions). Activity types: plugin_installation_preference_updated.

columns.name: marketplace_id
columns.description: Tagged ID of the marketplace. Activity types: cli_plugin_exec_policy_updated, marketplace_created, marketplace_deleted, marketplace_updated, marketplace_webhook_deleted, marketplace_webhook_provisioned, plugin_installation_preference_updated.

columns.name: op_name
columns.description: Op name (or '*' for the per-CLI default). Activity types: cli_plugin_exec_policy_updated.

columns.name: organization_name
columns.description: Top-level 'organization_name' property from the Claude compliance activity feed. Activity types: claude_github_integration_created, claude_github_integration_deleted, claude_github_integration_updated.

columns.name: resolved_count
columns.description: Top-level 'resolved_count' property from the Claude compliance activity feed. Activity types: admin_connector_request_resolved.

columns.name: tool_name
columns.description: Tool name (or '*' for the MCP-server-wide default). Activity types: mcp_tool_policy_updated.

columns.name: trigger_mode
columns.description: When code review is triggered. Activity types: claude_code_review_repository_added, claude_code_review_repository_updated.

columns.name: version
columns.description: Version string from the manifest. Activity types: desktop_extension_deleted, desktop_extension_uploaded, desktop_extension_version_uploaded, platform_skill_version_created, platform_skill_version_deleted.

columns.name: cadence
columns.description: Top-level 'cadence' property from the Claude compliance activity feed. Activity types: claude_code_security_scan_schedule_updated.

columns.name: compliance_api_enabled
columns.description: Top-level 'compliance_api_enabled' property from the Claude compliance activity feed. Activity types: org_compliance_api_settings_updated.

columns.name: compliance_api_logging_enabled
columns.description: Top-level 'compliance_api_logging_enabled' property from the Claude compliance activity feed. Activity types: org_compliance_api_settings_updated.

columns.name: environment_id
columns.description: Environment used for code review. Activity types: claude_code_review_config_updated, claude_code_security_center_config_updated.

columns.name: new_otlp_endpoint
columns.description: The OpenTelemetry export endpoint after the change. Credentials in the URL userinfo or query string are removed; path segments are retained. Null if the endpoint is unset or was not itself modified by this update. Activity types: org_cowork_otlp_settings_updated.

columns.name: new_otlp_protocol
columns.description: The OpenTelemetry export protocol after the change. Null if the protocol is unset or was not itself modified by this update. Activity types: org_cowork_otlp_settings_updated.

columns.name: new_otlp_resource_attributes
columns.description: The OpenTelemetry resource attributes after the change. Null if the attributes are unset or were not themselves modified by this update. Activity types: org_cowork_otlp_settings_updated.

columns.name: otlp_headers_change
columns.description: Whether the OpenTelemetry export headers were set or cleared. 'set' is recorded for any non-empty submission, including resubmission of an unchanged value. Header values are never included. Activity types: org_cowork_otlp_settings_updated.

columns.name: per_review_limit_usd
columns.description: Per-review spend limit in USD. Activity types: claude_code_review_config_updated.

columns.name: previous_enabled
columns.description: Whether code review was enabled before the change. Absent when no configuration existed before this update. Activity types: claude_code_review_config_updated.

columns.name: previous_environment_id
columns.description: Environment used for code review before the change. Absent when no configuration existed before this update or no environment was set. Activity types: claude_code_review_config_updated.

columns.name: previous_otlp_endpoint
columns.description: The OpenTelemetry export endpoint before the change. Credentials in the URL userinfo or query string are removed; path segments are retained. Null if the endpoint was previously unset or was not itself modified by this update. Activity types: org_cowork_otlp_settings_updated.

columns.name: previous_otlp_protocol
columns.description: The OpenTelemetry export protocol before the change. Null if the protocol was previously unset or was not itself modified by this update. Activity types: org_cowork_otlp_settings_updated.

columns.name: previous_otlp_resource_attributes
columns.description: The OpenTelemetry resource attributes before the change. Null if the attributes were previously unset or were not themselves modified by this update. Activity types: org_cowork_otlp_settings_updated.

columns.name: previous_per_review_limit_usd
columns.description: Per-review spend limit in USD before the change. Absent when no configuration existed before this update or no limit was set. Activity types: claude_code_review_config_updated.

columns.name: scans_cancelled
columns.description: Top-level 'scans_cancelled' property from the Claude compliance activity feed. Activity types: claude_code_security_scan_cancelled.

connectorUiConfig.title: BV-ClaudeCompliance (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
## BV-ClaudeCompliance (via Codeless Connector Framework)

This connector ingests **ClaudeCompliance** API data into Microsoft Sentinel using RestApiPoller.

### Data Collection
- Base API URL: `https://api.anthropic.com/`
- Authentication: `APIKey`
- Endpoint count: `1`

### Tables
- `ComplianceActivities` -> `BV_ClaudeCompliance_ComplianceActivities_CL`

### Sample Query
```kusto
BV_ClaudeCompliance_ComplianceActivities_CL
| take 10
```

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

instructionSteps.title: Connect BV-ClaudeCompliance (via Codeless Connector Framework) to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description:
To obtain a Claude Compliance API key, follow the instructions found here: [Access the Compliance API](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/13015708-access-the-compliance-api).

The API key created must include the **`read:compliance_activities`** scope for proper data ingestion.

Paste the key below and select **Connect**.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The BlueVoyant Anthropic Claude Compliance solution for Microsoft Sentinel ingests compliance activity data from the Anthropic Claude Compliance API into your workspace. Using a Codeless Connector Framework (CCF) data connector, it continuously collects compliance events into the BV_ClaudeCompliance_ComplianceActivities_CL table for monitoring, hunting, and detection.

Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:

This solution takes a dependency on the following technologies, and some of these dependencies either may be in Preview state or might result in additional ingestion or operational costs:

  • Codeless Connector Framework (CCF) data connector
  • Azure Monitor Data Collection Rules (DCR)
  • Azure Monitor Data Collection Endpoints (DCE)
  • Log Analytics custom tables

Data Connectors: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
